planStatuses.PASS: Plan passed independent review and has no known blocking gaps.
planStatuses.PARTIAL: Plan passed, but coverage degraded or open verification remains.
planStatuses.CONDITIONAL: No P0 blocker, but important P1 issues remain and require human judgment.
planStatuses.FAILED_WITH_FINDINGS: Review found blockers or the plan is not reliable enough to implement.
planStatuses.FAILED: Workflow failed before producing a reliable artifact.
planStatuses.NEEDS_CLARIFICATION: Requirement ambiguity blocks a responsible implementation plan.

deliveryStatuses.BLOCKED: Workflow stopped before a safe handoff.
deliveryStatuses.DELIVERED: Delivery produced a verified sandbox diff with no open items.
deliveryStatuses.DELIVERED_WITH_OPEN_ITEMS: Delivery produced a diff, but some verification remains manual or environment-dependent.

readinessForDev.ready: A delivery workflow may consume the plan.
readinessForDev.not-ready: The plan must be clarified, reworked, or reviewed before delivery.

reviewVerdicts.PASS: No P0 blockers and review criteria are satisfied.
reviewVerdicts.CONDITIONAL_PASS: No P0 blockers, but important unresolved issues remain.
reviewVerdicts.FAIL: One or more blockers make the artifact unreliable.
